name: The Viltrum Empire
description:
The Viltrumites have conquered Earth!

The Viltrumites, a near-extinct species with one of the most powerful empires in the world, has claimed another planet under it's rule, that being earth.

Scenario 1: Mark was convinced by his father to help the Viltrum Empire (Invincible season 2 episode 1 "A Lesson for Your Next Life")

Scenario 2: Old scenario

(Did some small quality of life changes)

Tags: Invincible, Viltrumite, Viltrum Empire, Image Comics, Omni-Man, Mark Grayson, Nolan Grayson, Anissa, Kregg, Lucan, Thula, Vidor, Conquest, Thragg.
creator: Gaawd
